# KrPartAction enumeration

Defines the action taken for a part.

```csharp
public enum KrPartAction
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Continue | `0` | Continue processing the part. |
| Skip | `1` | Skip the part content without storing. |
| Reject | `2` | Reject the request. |
